response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript and cloud technologies, including recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks. While he lacks direct experience with GenAI-specific systems (e.g., vector databases, RAG, multi-agent frameworks), his background in AI-agent tools and general AI system design suggests adaptability. His educational and professional diversity may dilute focus on core GenAI requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS, React, MongoDB).
Recent AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP, agentic workflows) relevant to GenAI systems.
Proven leadership in technical domains (e.g., GISCollective, pricing optimization at Optilyz).
concerns: No explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or GenAI-specific frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI).
Limited depth in AI performance metrics, optimization, or multi-agent system implementations.
Educational background in fine arts and photography may not align closely with advanced GenAI technical requirements.
